content: I'm an Analytics Engineer with 4+ years turning marketing and development data into measurement frameworks, self-service dashboards, and recommendations stakeholders can actually act on. I've built KPI reporting, experimentation and test-and-learn programs, and lifecycle marketing analytics across email, SMS/text, and fundraising channels.

On the data side I work in SQL (Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, MSSQL, PostgreSQL), Python, and dbt — building analytics-ready datasets, automated data-quality testing, and dimensional models that downstream BI and CRM teams depend on. I care about metric definitions everyone trusts, dashboards people actually self-serve, and analysis that translates cleanly for both technical and non-technical audiences.

highlights.title: BI & Visualization
highlights.description: Tableau, Power BI & Adobe Analytics — self-service dashboards, scorecards, and data storytelling.

highlights.title: Experimentation
highlights.description: A/B testing, test-and-learn frameworks, and experimentation design for channel performance.

highlights.title: Lifecycle Marketing
highlights.description: Email & SMS/text performance analytics with Salesforce Marketing Cloud and CRM/CDP platforms.

highlights.title: Data & SQL
highlights.description: Snowflake, Redshift & BigQuery with dbt, dimensional modeling, and SQL optimization.
